name: apple-dev
description: iOS development skill bundle: mirror a running Simulator into an in-app browser and capture proof frames, and live-iterate SwiftUI previews from importable Swift packages with hot reload.

interface.shortDescription: Mirror an iOS Simulator into a browser and live-iterate SwiftUI previews
interface.longDescription: iOS development workflows for AI coding agents. Mirror a running iOS Simulator into an in-app browser (cmux in-app browser, Chrome, or the runtime's own browser) via serve-sim and capture proof frames, or render SwiftUI previews from an importable Swift package in the simulator with dylib hot reload — no Xcode Canvas required. The browser step is environment-aware, so it works the same in Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, or any agent hosted in cmux.
defaultPrompt: Mirror the iOS simulator in the browser and show me a frame.
